name: GOLFTEC Alpharetta
about: GOLFTEC Alpharetta is a golf training and club fitting center focused on data-driven instruction. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback for swing improvement. GOLFTEC offers a structured approach to learning through certified coaches who create personalized game plans, making it suitable for both beginners and experienced golfers looking for systematic skill development.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced motion capture technology with OPTIMOTION for precise swing analysis
Data-driven approach using launch monitors and high-speed video for measurable improvement
Personalized coaching with certified PGA professionals creating tailored lesson plans
Club fitting services using launch monitors and shaft optimization for 21 more yards on average

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as launch monitor technology used in training bays and club fittings

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. Club rentals are available, and the pro shop offers equipment for purchase with a 10% discount off retail prices.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No specific information about outside food or drink policies is provided on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No information about simulator time for 18 holes is available, but practice sessions use coach-designed training plans with technology feedback.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs with advanced technology for youth instruction, though specific kid-friendly amenities aren't detailed.
